country.name: Singapore
country.tip: Design Orchard brings together proudly Singapore-made brands in one stop.
country.chinese_tip: Design Orchard 汇集许多新加坡本土品牌，可一站式选购。

products.name: Aroma Truffle black summer truffle chips
products.note: Protect the bag from crushing.
products.chinese_name: Aroma Truffle 黑夏松露薯片
products.description: Premium potato chips seasoned with black summer truffle.
products.why_buy: A Singapore-grown gourmet-snack brand for friends who prefer savoury gifts.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually more expensive or harder to find overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for fresher stock and a wider flavour range.
products.best_shops: Aroma Truffle stores, Design Orchard and premium grocers.

photos.alt_text: Aroma Truffle black summer truffle chips

reviews.body: A recognisable Singapore pick with easy-to-pack gifting appeal.

products.name: Bacha Coffee Singapore Morning sachets
products.note: Use the flat gift box to save suitcase space.
products.chinese_name: 夿萐咖啡新加坡早晨咖啡包
products.description: A luxe box of aromatic coffee sachets from Singapore-founded Bacha Coffee.
products.why_buy: The packaging feels special enough for a host or office gift.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually more expensive or harder to find overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for fresher stock and a wider flavour range.
products.best_shops: Bacha Coffee boutiques, ION Orchard and Changi Airport.

reviews.body: A recognisable Singapore pick with easy-to-pack gifting appeal.

products.name: Bee Cheng Hiang sliced pork bak kwa
products.note: Check your destination’s meat-import rules before buying.
products.description: Vacuum-packed charcoal-grilled pork jerky from a renowned Singapore brand.
products.why_buy: It is one of Singapore’s best-known edible gifts, especially for sharing.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually more expensive or harder to find overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for fresher stock and a wider flavour range.
products.best_shops: Bee Cheng Hiang outlets, Bugis, Chinatown and Jewel Changi.
products.online_availability: Available from Bee Cheng Hiang online.

photos.alt_text: Bee Cheng Hiang sliced pork bak kwa

reviews.body: A recognisable Singapore pick with easy-to-pack gifting appeal.

products.name: Bengawan Solo pandan chiffon cake
products.note: Buy close to departure and check shelf life.
products.chinese_name: Bengawan Solo 班兰戚风蛋糕
products.description: A soft green pandan chiffon cake from Singapore’s well-known bakery chain.
products.why_buy: Its fragrant pandan profile makes it distinctly Southeast Asian and giftable.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually more expensive or harder to find overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for fresher stock and a wider flavour range.
products.best_shops: Bengawan Solo outlets and Changi Airport.
products.online_availability: Not ideal for long-distance online delivery.

reviews.body: A recognisable Singapore pick with easy-to-pack gifting appeal.

products.name: Bengawan Solo pineapple tart box
products.note: Keep the box level in your luggage.
products.description: Buttery pineapple tarts from a classic Singapore bakery.
products.why_buy: It is a crowd-pleasing festive-style gift with a strong local bakery identity.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually more expensive or harder to find overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for fresher stock and a wider flavour range.
products.best_shops: Bengawan Solo outlets, malls and supermarkets.

reviews.body: A recognisable Singapore pick with easy-to-pack gifting appeal.

products.name: Fragrance pork bak kwa gift box
products.note: Choose sealed packs and check destination meat rules.
products.description: A sweet-savoury grilled pork jerky gift box from another familiar Singapore bak kwa name.
products.why_buy: It gives travellers a brand alternative when comparing Singapore’s bak kwa counters.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually more expensive or harder to find overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for fresher stock and a wider flavour range.
products.best_shops: Fragrance outlets, Bugis and Chinatown.

photos.alt_text: Fragrance pork bak kwa gift box

reviews.body: A recognisable Singapore pick with easy-to-pack gifting appeal.

products.name: Gryphon Singapore Breakfast tea sachets
products.note: Choose a sealed box or tin.
products.chinese_name: 格里芬新加坡早餐茶包
products.description: Beautifully packaged tea sachets from Singapore home-grown tea brand Gryphon Tea.
products.why_buy: It is a polished local alternative to TWG with a distinctly Singapore-inspired blend.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually more expensive or harder to find overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for fresher stock and a wider flavour range.
products.best_shops: Gryphon Tea stores, Design Orchard and premium grocers.

reviews.body: A recognisable Singapore pick with easy-to-pack gifting appeal.

products.name: Happy Merlion Family enamel keychain
products.note: Keep it in a small pouch to prevent scratches.
products.chinese_name: 快乐鱼尾狮珐琅钥匙扣
products.description: A cheerful Merlion keepsake from a Singapore souvenir specialist.
products.why_buy: The Merlion is Singapore’s enduring symbol and an easy, lightweight gift.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually imported at a 30–70% premium, when stocked at all.
products.savings: Buy locally to avoid import mark-ups and get the widest choice.
products.best_shops: Discover Singapore at Changi T3, Chinatown and souvenir stores.
products.airport_availability: Limited at airports; buy in town for the best choice and price.
products.online_availability: Available from selected specialist marketplaces, but provenance and prices vary.

reviews.body: A recognisable Singapore pick with easy-to-pack gifting appeal.
Packed well and made a thoughtful gift. I would buy it again from a local shop.
Good value compared with imported options; check the label and keep the receipt.

products.name: IRVINS salted egg fish skin
products.note: Keep the pouch on top of luggage to prevent crushing.
products.description: Crisp fish skin coated in rich salted-egg seasoning.
products.why_buy: IRVINS is a globally recognisable Singapore snack brand with bold gift-ready packs.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually more expensive or harder to find overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for fresher stock and a wider flavour range.
products.best_shops: IRVINS stores, FairPrice Finest, Jewel and major malls.

reviews.body: A recognisable Singapore pick with easy-to-pack gifting appeal.

products.name: Merlion fridge magnet
products.note: Buy multipacks for colleagues.
products.description: A simple Merlion magnet from Singapore’s dedicated souvenir shops.
products.why_buy: It is the most compact, unmistakably Singapore keepsake for a large gift list.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually more expensive or harder to find overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for fresher stock and a wider flavour range.
products.best_shops: Discover Singapore T3, Chinatown and Bugis souvenir shops.

reviews.body: A recognisable Singapore pick with easy-to-pack gifting appeal.

products.name: Prima Taste Hainanese chicken rice kit
products.note: Keep sachets dry and check expiry dates.
products.chinese_name: 百胜厨海南鸡饭料理包
products.description: A meal kit designed to recreate Singapore-style chicken rice at home.
products.why_buy: It packs a national hawker-dish reference into a light supermarket gift.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually more expensive or harder to find overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for fresher stock and a wider flavour range.
products.best_shops: FairPrice, Cold Storage, Mustafa Centre and supermarkets.

products.name: Prima Taste Singapore Laksa meal kit
products.note: Choose sealed packets with the longest best-before date.
products.chinese_name: 百胜厨新加坡叻沙料理包
products.description: A ready-to-cook kit for recreating rich Singapore-style laksa at home.
products.why_buy: It delivers a recognisable hawker flavour in a suitcase-friendly pack.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually imported at a 30–70% premium, when stocked at all.

Packed well and made a thoughtful gift. I would buy it again from a local shop.

products.name: Risis orchid brooch
products.note: Keep it in its presentation box.
products.description: A jewellery-style orchid brooch from Singapore heritage gift brand RISIS.
products.why_buy: The orchid makes a lasting, more refined Singapore symbol than a magnet.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually more expensive or harder to find overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for fresher stock and a wider flavour range.
products.best_shops: RISIS boutiques, TANGS and Jewel Changi.

products.name: Singapore Memories Singapore Girl perfume
products.note: Keep fragrances within airline liquid rules.

products.description: A locally made perfume inspired by Singapore’s tropical heritage.

products.typical_overseas_price: Usually more expensive or harder to find overseas.
products.savings: Buy locally for fresher stock and a wider flavour range.

products.name: Song Fa bak kut teh spice sachets
products.note: Check destination rules if the kit contains meat products.
products.description: Peppery herbal-spice sachets inspired by Song Fa’s Singapore bak kut teh.

products.savings: Buy locally for fresher stock and a wider flavour range.
products.best_shops: Song Fa outlets, FairPrice and specialty grocers.
